Name: Cloud
Description: Can use Cross Slash: physical single target with 50% chance to stop the enemy for a few seconds.. His Limit Break: Climhazzard, is a powerful Physical Single target attack.

Name: Zack
Specialty: Limit Break Specialist, Support, Paralysis, LB Booster
Description: Opens with Taunt. Can use Cross Slash for 30% chace to stop. His Limit break is Modulating Phase. It will select one random effect depending on luck, from filling the LB of the party, or do several types of attacks.

Name: Aeris
Specialty: Revive, Support, Limit Break Specialist, LB Booster
Description: Will use Renew if there is a K.O party member, or Healing Wind if not. Healing Wind is an AoE Healing spell. Her Limit break: Fury Brand, will give Limit Break Access to the whole party. It charges very slowly.

Name: Yuffie
Description: One of the quickest characters. She can Spam Limit Break after one single attack. Her Limit Break is Bloodfest, a multi hit physical attack on Single target.

Name: Vincent
Specialty: Fire, Ice, Aero, Thunder, Transformation, +3 Break
Description: Has access to Fire, Blizzard, Aero and Thunder spells. Once he access his Limit break, he will transform in to Chaos he will boost his Mag by x1.5 and Speed by 10, gain Death Penalty, a powerful single target Magical Attack.

Name: Barret
Description: Opens with Taunt. Resists all types of elements. His Limit Break Big Shot, it's a powerful Single Target Attack.

Name: Tifa
Specialty: Limit Break Specialist, Water, Chain Attacks
Description: She will charge up her STR with Battle Cry by x1.1. She gains Limit Break after a single turn, with it, she can make a combination from 2 to 4 attacks in a row in this order: Beat Rush, Somersault, Water Kick, Dolphin Blow

Name: Red XIII
Description: He specializes in hasting the party, doubling their speed. Has access to Haste and Fire spells, his Limit Break: Lunatic High, will haste the whole party for a long duration.

Name: Cid 7
Description: Cast a Shield of 3 charges on Tank. His Limit Break Highwind is an AoE attack that will delay the ATB of all enemies.

Name: Cait Sith
Description: Opens with Taunt. He will use Lucky Girl, boosting the Atk and Mag of all party members by 10%, stackable. His Limit Break dice will make him throw 3 dices. Depending how high he rolls, he can perform a devastating single target physical attack, or being a mediocre damage output.

Name: Sephiroth
Specialty: multi hit, Jump, Secret Limit Break, Petrify
Description: Sephiroth can use Octaslash, ST physical hit. Hell's Gate, an attack from the sky. His Limit Break needs to help of a LB Booster user. Supernova is an extremely powerful physical attack with 100% to Petrify all enemies.

Name: Squall
Description: Opens with Taunt. When he gets attacked, has a chance of 20% to use Auto-Potion. His Limit Break Renzokuken is a 5-6 multi hit attack, 25% chance to follow up with Rough Divide

Name: Zell
Specialty: Chain attack Limit Break Specialist, Fire, Burn
Description: He will Haste himself, if already hasted, he will haste someone else. He gains Limit Break after a single turn, with it, he can make a combination from 2 to 4 attacks in a row, in this order: Punch Rush, Booya, Heel Drop, and Burning Rave. 50% to Burn with Burning Rave

Name: Rinoa
Description: She has access to Angelo Recover, an AoE heal. Her Limit is Angelo Cannon, a powerful physical AoE. She has 50% to counter with Angelo when she is attacked.

Name: Irvine
Description: Irvine has access to all types of Physical attacks, from single target, to AoEs to multi-hits. He gains turns very quickly. His Flame Shot has 30% to Burn. His Limit Break, Pulse ammo is a physical hit that allows him to act right away again.

Name: Quistis
Description: Quistis has access to Fire Breath (Fire AoE, 30% Burn), Powershot (Mag or Atk, depending which stat is higher), Ultra Waves (Magic AoE) Gattling Gun (Multi-hit physical) Laser Eye (Single Target Magic). Her LB, Shockwave Pulsar, it's an extremely powerful Mag Aoe. Needs help of LB Booster character to activate it.

Name: Selphie
Description: Has access to All elemental spells. Her Limit Break Slots, will select a random spell and cast it from 2 to 3 times. Has a 10% chance to cast Full Heal, for a total restore on the party, and a 5% of casting The End, this will win the battle

Name: Kiros
Description: Has access to Double-Hit, Blitz: an AoE Physical hit, and Quickhit, an attack that refunds 50% of his atb back. His Limit Break, Bloodfest, is a multi-Hit physical attack with high potency. Really fast character.

Name: Laguna
Description: Has access to Gunshot, a single target physical attack, and Sleep. His Limit Break Desperado is an AoE powerful physical attack.

Name: Ward
Description: Physical attacker. His Limit Break Massive Anchor, is a massive Jump Attack, that has full potency on top of being AoE. Physical.

Name: Seifer
Description: Seifer has access to physicals and Fire Magic. His Limit Break, Demon Slice is a multi-hit physical attack that can follow up with 40% with Blood Fest

Name: Raijin
Description: Opens with Taunt. Raijin Special is a powerful physical single target. His Limit Break allows him to throw a Hi-potion to himself, fully restoring him. Can Counter on 70% Chance. Resists Thunder

Name: Edea
Description: Has access to Stop, a garanteed paralysis for a few seconds. Ice Strike is a single target spell with Ice element with 30% to paralyze and 30% to freeze. Double damage is Enemy is already paralized. Her Limit Break Maelstorm, a powerful AoE Magic Attack that delays the targets, and has a chance to stop enemies.

Name: Ultimecia
Description: Powerful Mage. She has access to Hell Judgement, a single target powerful spell. Shadow Flare, single target spell. Holy, AoE with Holy element, Earquake: Aoe Magic Earth spell and her Limit break: Ultima, AoE Powerful Magic spell.

Name: Zidane
Description: Can Steal an enemy attack and use it against it. Has 50% Chance to counter with a physical attack. When entering trance, gains x1.5 Atk and 11 Speed, it will have access Free Energy and Shift Break, powerful Single target physical attacks.

Name: Vivi
Specialty: Chain Magic, Trance, Fire, Ice, Thunder. Poison, Burn, Freeze
Description: Can Cast Blizzard Fire and Bio. When Trancing, he boosts his MAG by x1.5, and gain access to double cast. It will use Thunder, Fire, or Ice twice in a row, uninterrupted.

Name: Steiner
Description: Opens with Taunt. Can use Thunder Slash, a physical Thunder attack. Shock, powerful non-elemental physical hit. His Limit Break is minus strike, gain potency based on how low his HP is. He can counter on a 50% Chance.

Name: Garnet
Description: Has access to Cure and Cheer, an AoE heal that will boost the attack of every party member by 15% (Stackable), that also gives x1 hields to 5 players. When Trancing, she gains x1.3 Mag and 4 Speed, and she will swap her kit to a DPS, casting Holy every turn. (AoE Magic attack). Becomes Fast.

Name: Freya
Description: Can Jump in the air for one turn, Lancet can attack and restores half of the damage on to Freya. Fire Breath is an AoE Fire physical hit with 30% to Burn. Dragon crest, an AoE physical attack that gains potency the further in the stage is in.

Name: Amarant
Description: Opens with Taunt. No Mercy: Single Target. Has 70% chance to counter with Curse (15% Atk and Mag Down). When Trancing, gets massive +32 Speed and 50% Atk up. His counter chance goes from 70% to 100% when trancing.

Name: Eiko
Description: Concentrate: AoE Heal that boost the MAG of the party by 15% (Stackable) that also gives x1 shield to 4 players. When Trancing, she gains access to Double-Cast: She will heal/revive twice in a row. Very powerful comeback

Name: Quina
Specialty: Finisher, Status Effects, Wind, Self Heal
Description: Opens with Taunt. Large amount of attacks and Limits from other characters. Bad Breath (AoE 70% Petrify), Desperado, Lancet, Storm Breath (Wind AoE). When the enemy is at less than 30% HP, she will eat them, reducing the HP to 0.

Name: Beatrix
Description: Shock: Physical Single target. Climhazzard: Physical Single Target. Has access to Cure. Her Limit Break, Roses of May is a tremendous Physical AoE Attack that also heals the party. Can only be activated with the help of Supports like Aerith, Zack, Etc.

Name: Marcus
Specialty: Steal, Late Game, Limit Break Specialist.
Description: Can Steal an enemy attack and use it against it.His Limit Break: Thievery, is a single target physical attack that gains potency the further the party is on to the NG+ stages. When he uses Thievery, he drops whatever he stole, and will attempt to steal a different attack.

Name: Kuja
Description: Powerful Mage. Flare: Single target non-elemental spell. Holy: AoE holy elemental spell. His limit Break: Flare Star, is a powerful AoE Magic Spell with. slow Charge.

Name: Tidus
Description: Very Fast. He will Open up with Hastega. a short duration Haste effect on the entire party. Quick hit: Weak physical attack that refunds half of his ATB. Slice&Dice: Multi-hit. His Limit Break Blitz Ace, is a multi-hit physical attack, will allow him to attack again.

Name: Yuna
Specialty: Summon, Fire, Thunder, Ice, Delay, AoE, Burn
Description: She has access to Valefor (Delays ATB of enemy), Ifrit, Shiva and Ixion. Her Limit Break, Bahamut, is a powerful AoE Magic Attack. All her summons use MAG to deal damage.

Name: Lulu
Specialty: Chain spells, Thunder, Ice, Water, Fire. Burn, Freeze, Poison
Description: Can Cast Thunder, Fire, Ice and Blizzard. Her Limit Break, Fury: Will allow her to cast any of her spells from 2 to 3 times.

Name: Auron
Description: Opens with Taunt. Armor Break: Reduces the DEF of the enemy by x0.8. His Limit Break: Dragon Fang, is an AoE Physical attack that reduces the ATB.Slow Charge. Can counter with 70% chance

Name: Kimahri
Description: Can Jump for one turn to avoid all damage. Seed Cannon: Single target Physical. White Wind: AoE Heal. Fire Breath: AoE Fire Mag attack 30% Burn. His Limit Break: Nova, is a powerful AoE Attack.

Name: Seymour
Description: Has access to Anima. Pain has 30% chance to Stop the enemy. Oblivion is a AoE Non-Elemental Magic attack. His Limit Break: Requiem, it's a powerful Aoe Magical spell.

Name: Firion
Description: Opens with Taunt. Blood Sword: Will Attack and heal himself for half of the damage caused. His Limit Break: Wild Rose: is an AoE Heal the whole party.

Name: Cecil (D.Knight)
Description: Darkness is a powerful Aoe Dark attack, Loses 15% of his HP. Valiant Blow is a physical Single target Dark Attack. Will lose 20% of his HP. Gives Full ATB to 2 allies. His Limit Break: Dark Cannon, powerful Single Target Dark attack. Transforms into Paladin Cecil.

Name: Cecil (Paladin)
Description: Can cast Cure. Can cast x3 Shield on Tank. Light Slash is a single target physical holy attack that recovers 15% of his HP. His Limit Break:Holy Flame, will deal AoE Physical damage with Holy element while also healing 20% of the party's HP. Transforms in to Dark Knight Cecil.

Name: Terra
Specialty: Counter, Trance, Fire, AoE, Burn, Poison
Description: Can Cast Fire. Can counter with 30% with Riot Blade, a powerful Magic attack. When Trancing: Gaings 50% Mag and 15 Speed. Gains access to Flare: Single Target Magic attack, and Meltdown, powerful Aoe Magic Attack.

Name: Gogo
Description: Mimics the last performed action of an ally, including Limit Breaks, transformations, or counters.

Name: Balthier
Description: Opens with Taunt. Can use Element of Treachery (Wind), Tides of Fate (Non-Element), or Fires of War (Fire). They all are AoE physical attacks that can trigger again on a 30% Chance. His Limit Break: Strahl Support: Is a multi hit single target attack.

Name: Lightning
Specialty: Fast, Target Weakness, Thunder. Healer, +3 Break
Description: If thunder weakness, uses Thunder spell, or Spark Strike: single target phy Thunder attack. If not weak to thunder, will use Launch: Single Target physical, and Blittz: Aoe Physical attack, Her Limit Break: Army of One, is a multi hit powerful single target attack. Will Cure if low HP ally.

Name: Umaro
Description: Can use Slam, ST physical hit. Limit break is SnowStorm. physical hit, Ice element, with 100% Chance to cause Freeze. 50% Chance to counter with a physical hit.

Name: Jill
Specialty: Ice, Heal, Freeze, Paralysis, Low potency
Description: Can use Ice Age: A blizzard spell with low potency that can freeze 100% of the time, with an additional small AoE Heal. Her LB, Diamond Dust, is an Ice spell with 100% to paralyze and to Freeze, at the cost  of lower potency.

Name: Joshua
Description: Can use Eikonic Fire, a Fire spell with 100% to Burn. His LB, Fire Surge is an AoE Fire spell with 100% to Burn, and a small heal to the party.

Name: Rude
Description: Opens with Taunt. Can cast Cure. Limit break is Grandspark, it's a physical single target hit that also recovers HP in AoE.

Name: Fujin
Description: She will charge up for one turn, boosting her Mag stat by 30% - On the next turn, she will use her limit break Tornado, an AoE Magical Wind Attack.

Name: Reno
Description: Can cast Thunder, Can use Electromagnetic Rod, physical target with thunder element with a 100% chance to paralyze. His Limit break is Reno Special, a potent physical single target hit. After using it, will act again.

Name: Locke
Description: Can use Steal to take one random enemy skill and use it against it. His Limit break needs the help of a Limit Break Booster character. Phoenix allows him to fully restore and revive the entire party.

Name: Elena
Description: Every turn, she will fill the ATB gauge for the entire party by a value of 200. Her Limit Break, Elena's Special, it's a 2 part physical hit.

Name: Celes
Description: Every turn, she will raise a Runic stance, when an enemy cast a single target magical hit, she will redirect it to herself, and block the damage, once. If a Runic is already up, and the enemy is weak to holy, it will use Holy. Otherwise, she will use Blizzard. Her LB is Ultima, powerful AoE Spell.

Name: Rufus
Description: Rufus has access to all types of Physical attacks, from single target, to AoEs to multi-hits. He gains turns very quickly. His Limit Break summons his partner Dark Nation for a powerful physical hit that delays the target.

Name: Rikku
Specialty: Reviver, Fast, AoE, Limit Break Specialist, LB Booster
Description: If a party member is K.Od, she will revive them with a  phoenix down, if not, Rikku throws grenades, physical AoE. Her LB Mix can create a lot of different attacks, from single target, to multiple hits, and even Boosting the Limit Break of party members.

Name: Luneth
Description: Luneth will randomly choose one of this 2 available jobs, Sage or Ninja, and transform in to them. He will equalize his Atk or Mag stat, depending which one is higher.

Name: Luneth Ninja
Description: Luneth will do a 10-multi hit physical attack. His Limit Break charges after only 3 turns. It will throw a powerful Fuma Shuriken.

Name: Luneth Sage
Specialty: Fire, Thunder, Water, Ice, Healer, Shield
Description: Luneth will have access to Fire, Thunder, Water and Ice spells. Also Can cast Curaga in AoE. Can cast Wall, which gives x1 Shield to the entire party. His Limit Break, Ultima, it's a powerful AoE Spell

Name: Bartz
Specialty: Spirit Booster, Wind, AoE, LB Specialist, Shield
Description: Bartz will boost the spirit stat of all party members by x1.1 that also gives x1 Shield to 4 players.. Wind Slash will deal physical damage in AoE.

Name: Edgar
Description: Edgar can use Bio Blaster to Poison all enemies and deal physical damage. Drill is a physical single target hit that ignores 50% of target's defense. His Limit Break, Royal Shock, is a powerful physical single target that increases whatever Dot the enemy has by 22%

Name: Sabin
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Uses Aura Bolt, a physical thunder hit. Can use Fire Dance, an AoE Physical Hit with a 30% to Burn each enemy. His Limit Break is Suplex. he will bloody suplex the enemy.

Name: Rosa
Description: She can cast prayer, an AoE recovery spell. Her Limit Break is slow to charge. She has 2 Limit Breaks. If any ally is K.Od, she will use Divine Resurrection will revive all party members with 1 HP. If there isn't a K.O Party member, she will use Holy Arrow, an AoE Magical Hit that also heals the party. Holy Element

Name: Maria
Description: She can cast Aura on a random party member, completely filling their Limit Break. Her own Limit break, Ultima, is an AoE powerful Spell

Name: Snow
Description: Will Open with Taunt. His first turn is Steelguard. Snow will use Blizzard Spells or IceStrike (Physical) if the enemy is weak to Ice. Both 30% to Freeze. Otherwise, he will use single target physical attacks. His Limit Break summons the Shiva sisters, to deal magical AoE Ice damage. 30% Chance to Freeze. 50% to Counter when hit.

Name: Wol
Description: Will open with Taunt. Wol (Warrior of Light) can use Light Wave, a physical holy element attack. His Limit Break Soul of Light, is a holy 7 multi-hits physical attack that also gives x1 Shield to the entire party. 50% to counter.

Name: Garland
Description: Can use Dark Wave, a physical Dark element attack. His Limit Break Soul of Chaos, is a Dark 7 AoE physical attack. 50% to Counter

Name: Noctis
Description: Fast ATB. Can use Warp Strike, a physical single target. His Limit Break, Armiger, is a 13 multi hit single target attack, one for each royal weapon.

Name: Jecht
Description: Jecht can use Jecht Beam, physical single target with 30% to Burn. Jecht Bomber is an AoE Fire physical hit with also 30% to Burn. His Limit break transforms him on to his Final Aeon Form, boosting his Atk by x1.5

Name: Braska
Description: Can Summon Jecht on his Final Aeon form, to cause Magical hits, single and AoE targets. He has 2 Limit Breaks. If any ally is K.Od, he will revive all party members with 1 HP. If there isn't a K.O Party member, he will use Holy Arrow, an AoE Magical Hit that also heals the party. Holy Element

Name: Blank
Specialty: Steal, Late Game, Limit Break Specialist.
Description: Can Steal an enemy attack and use it against it.His Limit Break: Thievery, is a single target physical attack that gains potency the further the party is on to the NG+ stages. When he uses Thievery, he drops whatever he stole, and will attempt to steal a different attack.

Name: Wakka
Description: Deals extra damage to flying enemies. Can throw his blitzball for a physical single target hit. Can use Sleep Attack, physical hit that deals extra damage to birds, and have a 70% to cause Sleep. His Limit Break, Auroch Reels, is an AoE physical attack.

Name: Ramza
Description: Can use Tailwind, increases the speed by 10 on a every party member. (Up to 80 speed base) His Limit Break, Ultima, is a powerful AoE Spell.

Name: Agrias
Description: Can use Hallowed Bolt, an AoE physical Thunder attack. Her Limit Judgement Blade, is an AoE Ice physical attack with 100% to Freeze the enemies.

Name: Edge
Description: I will haste himself at the start. If he is already hasted, will cast it on someone else. Limit Break charges after 1 turn. Ninja Spirit, is a multi hit physical attack.

Name: Lenna
Description: Can use Water Curse, a Water spell that reduces the defense of the enemy by 20%.Her Limit Break Aqualung is an Aoe Water spell. that allows her to act again.

Name: Vaan
Specialty: Chain Attacks, Fire, Burn, Wind Late Game
Description: Vaan can use Red Spiral (Physical ST) White Whorl (Wind AoE) and Pyroclasm (Fire ST, 30% to Burn) After every turn, he has a 30% to chain in to another one of his moves, potentially infinitely. His Limit Break Traveler, deals more damage the further on the stages the party is.

Name: Genesis
Description: Genesis performs 10 hit physical attacks. His limit Break Apocalypse, is a strong physical AoE that delays all enemies.

Name: Ace
Description: Ace throws a card being a single target physical attack. His Limit Break, Light Wave, is a powerful single target holy element physical attack.

Name: Paine
Description: Paine has access to physicals and Fire Magic. Her Limit Break, Demon Fang, is a powerful AoE physical hit that also delays all enemies.

Name: Queen
Description: Blizzard riposte is a physical single target Ice attack with 100% to freeze. Blizzard ROK is a Magic AoE Ice Attack with also 100% to cause Freeze. Her Limit Break Divine Judgement is an AoE Magic Ice attack that has 100% to freeze and heal allies.

Name: Cor
Description: Cor will use Moonlight Dawn on the fastest ally, giving it also +10 Speed. Every time that ally acts, he will perform a follow up physical multi hit and boosting their ATB by one fifth. His Limit break Lion Roar is a potent AoE Physical attack that refills the ATB of up to 2 random allies

Name: Minwu
Description: Minwu will always revive a KO ally. if there is none, he will cast Cure on the most hurt ally. His Limit Break Soul of Convergence is a Holy physical Beam that refunds 80% of his ATB

Name: Kain
Description: Kain will jump in the air, allowing him to avoid direct damage. His Limit Break Rising Drive is a multi hit high potency physical attack on a single target.

Name: Guy
Description: Opens with Taunt. Has access to Sleep Axe and Petrify Axe, both having 70% to activating the status effect. Very Slow character. His Limit Break Gaiga Rumble is a strong Physical AoE with Earth elemental damage.

Name: Rydia
Specialty: Summon, Fire, Ice, Thunder, Earth, Holy, +3 Break
Description: She has access to Ifrit, Shiva, Ramuh and Titan. Her Limit Break, Mist, is a powerful AoE Magic Holy Attack. All her summons use MAG to deal damage. Ifrit and Shiva can cause Dots with 30%

Name: Faris
Description: Will steal enemy attacks and use them against them. Her Limit Break Fire Blessing fully refills the ATB of the entire Team. Fast Character

Name: Cyan
Description: Will open with Taunt. Fang is a strong potency single target attack. When he gets attacked, he will respond with Sky on a 70%, also a strong single physical target, makes him lose his turn. His Limit Break, Tempest, is a very high potency multi hit physical attack.

Name: Yuna X2
Specialty: Stat Selector, multi hit, Fast, +3 Break
Description: Yuna has 2 types of shoots. Power Shot and Magic Shot. She will use one or the other based on whatever stat is higher. Her Limit Break, Trigger Happy, is a very long multi hit string that also uses atk or mag depending on which stat is higher.

Name: Kefka
Specialty: Fire, Ice, Poison, Status Conditions, Dot Enhancer
Description: Kefka has access to Fire, Blizzard, Bio, all being magic attacks. His Limit Break Forsaken is a strong non-elemental AoE Spell that causes a random Dot to apply with 100% Chance. Additionally, increases the Dots a random enemy accumulated by 12%

Name: Ashe
Description: Northswain Glow is a holy single target Magic attack. Her Limit Break Maelstrom Bolt is an AoE Thunder Spell that also powers up 30% of Atk and Mag of the entire party. Stackable

Name: Sazh
Description: If enemy is weak to fire, will use Enfire, a spell that will make every physical attack from the party to be Fire element (if not elemental), otherwise, will use Blitz, an Aoe physical hit that deals extra damage if only one enemy is present. His Limit Break Hastega+ is a long duration Haste effect on all allies.

Name: Thancred
Description: Opens with Taunt. Can use Gnashin Fang, which may continue with 60% on to the rest of his combo. His LB, Bloodlust, gives him 4 to 5 bullets, which he can incorporate on his Gnashing Fang Combo as continuations between attacks. Refills 50% ATB and 20% Atk Up. Can Counter 60% with Burst Strike

Name: Alisaie
Specialty: 200 IQ, Chain Attacks, Status Conditions, Multielement
Description: Verfire and Verstone has 50% to proc Accelerate, which enables a follow up Verthunder and Veraero respectively. These 2 has 20% to give Dual Cast, which is another follow up to the other element they didn't use before. Her Limit Break Riposte forces Accelerate for another chain.

Name: Gladio
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Perform Single target physical hits. His Limit Break Maelstrom is a powerful Aoe physical hit that delay all enemies. He can counter on an 80% chance.

Name: Clive
Description: Ignition covers him on Fire to deal physical Fire single target damage with 30% to Burn. Raging fist is an Earth physical single target attack. His Limit Break, Zantetsuken is an AoE Slash physical attack to all enemies.

Name: Delita
Description: Unyielding Blade breaks the armor of the enemy, lowering their defense by 30%. His Limit Break Northswain Strike is a Magical Holy single attack.

Name: Orlandeau
Specialty: Haste, Thunder, Ice, Stats Down, Freeze
Description: Opens up with Hastega. Has access to Hallowed Bolt (Thunder AoE), Unyielding Blade (Def down 30%) and Crushing Blade (Atk and Mag 20% Down) His Limit Break Judgement Blade, is an AoE Ice Attack with 100% to Freeze.

Name: Emperor
Description: Has access to Red Soul, 100% Burn Spell, Dreary Cell, 100% to Poison. His Limit Break Starfall is an AoE Meteor from the sky that will Sleep enemies with 100% chance.

Name: Gilgamesh
Description: Has access to all the attacks and limit breaks from all characters of Season 2

Name: Matoya
Description: If enemy is weak to thunder, will use Enthunder, a spell that will make every physical attack from the party to be Thunder element (if not elemental). Otherwise, she will cast Charge, a self Mag 30% up. Her Limit Break, Thundaja, is a powerful AoE Thunder spell

Name: Yunalesca
Description: Can use Hellbiter, has a 100% to Poison the target. Her Limit Break Megadeath is an AoE Spell with 100% to Poison every enemy, and also Petrify them

Name: Gordon
Description: Raging Spear is a single target physical attack. His Limit Break Break XVI is potent Spell that hits in AoE that also petrifies 100% of the time.

Name: Cloud AC
Description: Blade Beam is a single target attack that splashes on to more enemies if there is. Increased potency if only one enemy. His Limit Break Meteorain is a single target Multi-hit strong physical attack.

Name: Ingus
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Can Perform Double Slashes, physical single target multi hit. Can counter with 50% Chance. His Limit break, Charge! fully refills the ATB of every ally

Name: Shantotto
Description: Has access to Bio, Magic spell with 30% to Poison. Her Limit Break Chainspell, will allow her to cast Bio 2-3 times in a row.

Name: Fran
Description: Has access to her Quickenings Feral Strike, Whip Kick and Maelstrom Bolt. Each has 30% to chain up on to another quickening. They all use Magic Stat. Her Limit Break Horology deals potency based on the hour of the day (The minutes) in AoE

Name: Hope
Description: Has access to Medic Cura, an AoE Curative spell. Heals slightly extra if the ally is low HP. His Limit break Last Resort is a single target Magic Attack that refunds 80% of his ATB

Name: Edea Matron
Specialty: Ice, Fire, Paralysis, Conditional Damage, Freeze, Burn
Description: Ice Strike is a single target spell with Ice element with 30% to Paralyze and 30% to freeze. Double damage is Enemy is already paralyzed. Her Limit Break Fire Storm is an AoE powerful Fire Spell with 100% to Burn.

Name: Garnet Summoner
Specialty: Summon, Fire, Ice, Thunder, Burn, Freeze
Description: Can Summon Ifrit (30% Burn), Shiva (30% Freeze), and Ramuh. Her Limit Break Allows her to summon Ark, a powerful non-elemental Aoe Magic Hit. All her summons use her Magic Stat

Name: Ignis
Description: He can detect if the target is weak to Thunder, Fire or Ice, and swap his bind daggers to that element. If not weakness is detected, he will cook a quick recipe healing a hurt ally. His Limit Break, High Jump, is a powerful Jump Attack. Firebind is multi hit. Frostbind is Aoe, is powerful single

Name: Cod
Description: Can use Bad Breath, has 70% to petrify all enemies. Can use Lighting, an AoE Thunder physical attack. Her Limit Break particle Beam is an AoE Spell that causes non-elemental damage. Charges up fast.

Name: Tifa Dress
Specialty: Limit Break Specialist, Water, Chain Attacks
Description: She will charge up her STR with Battle Cry by x1.1. She gains Limit Break after a single turn, with it, she can make a combination from 2 to 4 attacks in a row in this order: Beat Rush, Somersault, Water Kick, Dolphin Blow

Name: Alphinaud
Description: Dosis is a magical single target attack that also heals a hurt ally at the same time. His Limit Break Techne Makre is a very powerful AoE Curative spell to all allies.

Name: Shadow
Description: Will open with Taunt.  Charges ATB really fast. Opens up with Taunt. When attacked, has 50% to respond with Interceptor. Can Throw Shurikens for single target damage and perform multihits with Double Slash. His Limit Break, Shadow Fang is a strong multi hit physical attack.

Name: Torgal
Description: Will use x3 Shield on Tanks. Can Use Sic, a multi hit Physical attack. His Limit Break, Fenrir's Moonlight, will completely charge the Limit Break of everyone in the party. You must pet the dog.

Name: Isaaru
Description: Isasaru can Summon Yojimbo. Daigoro may petrify on 30% while dealing physical damage. Kozuka is a Multi-hit physical attack. His Limit Break, Wakizashi, is a powerful AoE Physical attack. Has 5% to Become Zanmato, instantly defeating all enemies.

Name: Leon
Description: Has access to Dark Slash, a High potency single target hit that sacrifices 15% of his HP for the increased damage. His Limit Break: Dark Stream, is a Magical Dark attack in AoE that sacrifices 15% of his HP for increased damage.

Name: Yshtola
Specialty: Fire, Ice, Multicast, AoE, Freeze, Burn
Description: Starts with +2 Shield Charges. If there is only one enemy alive, she will use Blizzard IV, Magical Hit with 30% to Freeze. If more than one enemy, she will use Fire II, Aoe Magical  hit with 30% To burn. Her Limit Break Triple Cast will make her cast 3 Times.

Name: Basch
Description: Opens With Taunt. All his attacks have 30% to make him act again.Fulminating Darkness a single Phy Hit. Dark element.  Ruin Impediment is a Single Phy Non Elemental. Flame Purge is a single Phy Fire Hit. Has no LB. Can use poach to Finish up an enemy at 30% HP left.

Name: Estinien
Description: Can Jump in the air to avoid damage, and cause a single target Physical hit on his descent. His LB, Starcross, is an AoE Physical hit of high potency.

Name: Cid 4
Description: Opens with Taunt. Has access to Sleep Axe and Petrify Axe, both having 70% to activating the status effect.  His LB is Enterprise Fire Support. A high potency multi hit on a single target.

Name: Rubicante
Specialty: Ruby Weapon hates him. Fire, Fire Resist, AoE, Resurrect, ATB Boost
Description: Resist Fire. Can use Inferno, an AoE Fire Magic that deals 50% more damage to Frozen enemies.  When Rubicante is under 50% HP, he will cast Cure on Himself. His Limit Break Resurrection March, will revive everyone in Aoe, and additionally, give 3 random allies Full ATB.

Name: Prompto
Description: Has access to Gunshot, a multi hit physical attack. His Limit Break, Rapidus SMG, is 10-hit Single target high potency attack. These will act as Single Target instead of Multihits and proc Single Target bonuses.

Name: Ovelia
Description: Can use Aegis, an AoE Healing Spell that additionally gives +1 Shield to 8 random allies. Her Limit Break, Holy, is an AoE Porwerful Holy Magical attack. Refunds 80% of her ATB

Name: Porom
Description: If a party member is K.O'd, she will cast Life to revive it. If not, she will cast Curaja, an Aoe Medium potency Healing spell. Her Limit Break, Cry, will lower the Atk and Mag of  one enemy by 10%, refunds 80% of her ATB

Name: Vanille
Description: Can use Defang, a 10% Decrease on an enemy of Atk and Mag, with a 30% to Act again right away. Can Also use Slow, reduces the base speed of the enemy by 7 with 25% to act again. Her Limit Break, Death, is a high potency Single Target Magical Hit with 5% to One-shot the Target.

Name: Palom
Description: Has access to Fire, Blizzard, Thunder, Aero, Bio and Water Spells. His Limit Break, Bluff, will increase his Mag stat by 30%, and allow him to act right away again.

Name: Desch
Specialty: Thunder, Paralysis, Increased potency on paralysis
Description: Can use Thunderclap, a Thunder Physical hit that deals 40% more damage to paralyzed foes. His Limit Break: Electric Floor, is an AoE skill that paralyzes all enemies, and allows him to act again right away.

Name: Dark Invoker
Description: All his Attacks are Mag - Has access to Dark Energy Ray (AoE, Dark) Mega Flare (AoE, Dark) Meteor Strike (Single, Fire), Aero Spark (Single Thunder) Heavenly Strike (Single, Ice) His Limit break, Delta attack, is an AoE Dark Elemental spell.

Name: Seymour Omnis
Description: Can cast Fire, Blizzard, Thunder or Water at slightly lower potency. If enemy is is weak of any of those, will use the right element. His Limit Break, Quadra cast, will use a Random spell 4 times in a row

Name: Pupu
Description: Pupu will ask for an Elixir (Medium potency Aoe Heal). With his Limit Break, will thank for the elixir with a small potency AoE heal, and 10% Atk, Mag and Spi to the party.

Name: Mog
Description: His kit changes depending on your !preference. Atk will use Raging Spear (Single, Phy). Mag will use Fire II (Fire, spell, Aoe, 30% Burn), Spi will use Love Serenade (Aoe Heal), hp/none result on a Phy Hit. LB is Dance, changes weather based on preference. Atk Sunny, Mag Snow, Spi/Hp Rain

Name: Galuf
Description: Opens up with Taunt, Galuf can do a combination of 10-Hit on random enemies. 70% to Counter with a physical hit. His Limit Break, Focus, is a self Atk up by 30%

Name: Tellah
Description: Can cast Fire, Thunder, Blizzard and Bio. His Limit Break, Meteor, is a really high potency Magical hit in Aoe, that sets his own HP to 1

Name: Relm
Description: Relm can use Sketch, a skill that allows her to make a copy of the enemy, and use one of their attacks against him. Can copy most Abilities. Her Limit Break Star Prism, is a powerful Single target magic spell with 5% to One-Shot the target.

Name: Squall Space
Description: Open up with Taunt. Can use his Gunblade, a Physical single target hit. When he gets attacked, has a chance of 20% to use Auto-Potion. His Limit Break Renzokuken is a 5-6 multi hit attack, 25% chance to follow up with Rough Divide

Name: Rikku X2
Description: Can use Quick-Hit, a low potency physical hit that refunds half of her ATB. Her Limit Break, Steal-Time, is a 100% Paralysis skill that deals no damage, but refunds 80% of her ATB back.

Name: Penelo
Description: Penelo can use Intercession and Evanescence, Single target Magic spells with 30% to combo and make her act again. Her Limit Break requires Boosting from other characters: Resplendence, it's a tremendous High potency Aoe spell that gives +3 Shields to all party members.

Name: Fang
Description: Can deal Physician single target Hits. Her Limit Break, Highwind, is a jumping ability that deals high physical Damage.

Name: Auron Young
Description: Opens with Taunt. Armor Break: Reduces the DEF of the enemy by x0.8. His Limit Break: Dragon Fang, is an AoE Physical attack that reduces the ATB.Slow Charge. Can counter with 70% chance

Name: Beatrix Beach
Description: Shock: Physical Single target. Climhazzard: Physical Single Target. Has access to Cure. Her Limit Break, Roses of May is a tremendous Physical AoE Attack that also heals the party. Can only be activated with the help of Supports like Aerith, Zack, Etc.

Name: Cloud Dress
Description: Can use Cross Slash: physical single target with 50% chance to stop the enemy for a few seconds.. His Limit Break: Climhazzard, is a powerful Physical Single target attack.

Name: Celes Opera
Description: Every turn, she will raise a Runic stance, when an enemy cast a single target magical hit, she will redirect it to herself, and block the damage, once. If a Runic is already up, and the enemy is weak to holy, it will use Holy. Otherwise, she will use Blizzard. Her LB is Ultima, powerful AoE Spell.

Name: Tifa Ac
Specialty: Limit Break Specialist, Water, Chain Attacks
Description: She will charge up her STR with Battle Cry by x1.1. She gains Limit Break after a single turn, with it, she can make a combination from 2 to 4 attacks in a row in this order: Beat Rush, Somersault, Water Kick, Dolphin Blow

Name: Ozma
Description: Opens with Taunt. Can use Curse (AoE) - Reduces Atk and Mag of all enemies by 15%, without causing damage. Can cast Meteor, a Magical Aoe Hit non-elemental. His Limit Break, Doomsday, is a powerful Aoe Magical hit, also non elemental. Can counteri with Curaga with 20% Chance.

Name: Cid Randell
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Uses Judsword, a physical hit single target that drains 50% of the damage dealt. His Limit Break, Red Card, Petrifies all the enemies, and allows him to act again.

Name: Chocobo
Description: Can cast Choco Cure. His Limit Break, Chocobo Heal, is an AoE powerful Heal

Name: Chocobo Red
Description: Can use Choco Kick, a physical single target hit. Her Limit break, Chocobo Meteor, is a powerful AoE physical hit.

Name: Chocobo Black
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Can use Choco Kick, a physical single target hit. His Limit Break, Chocobo Star, is an Aoe physical hit that will drain as HP half of the damage caused.

Name: Ghido
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Can use Water Magic spell, single target. His Limit Break, Torrent, is a powerful Aoe Water Magical hit that gives 1 Shield to the entire party.

Name: Babus
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Can use Stillness, an AoE Magical hit that reduces the Speed of every boss by flat 2. His Limit Break, Explode, is a powerful AoE Fire elemental Magical hit with 30% to Burn. Can counter with Runic Counter, a Magical single target hit. on 50% chance.

Name: Metuba
Description: Can play the Tuba with qwerty keyboard keys if streamer feels particularly inspired. Can use Bass Blast, an Aoe Non-Elemental Aoe Magic spell. His LB, Symphony of the Night, is a Magical Spell that boost Atk and Mag of the party by 30%

Name: Vegeta
Description: Can use Ki-Blast, a Multi-hit Physical attack. Big Bang, a big energy Aoe Physical Attack. His Limit Break, Final Flash, is a powerful Aoe Physical attack that occasionally destroy parts of the UI - Changes hair color to Blonde

Name: Silenrea
Description: Can use Fire, Thunder, Fire Breath. Their LB, Zorgoia transformation, transforms them on to a giant Zorgoian. Gains access to Darting Barb, a 30% paralyzing physical hit, Lancet, a physical hit that absorbs 50% of the damage caused, and Unrelenting Assault, a Multi-Hit physical attack. The Limit Break becomes Just a Taste, is a single target physical hit low potency with 100% chance to paralyze that has 2% of One-Shot most enemies. Makes it return to normal form.

Name: Solanin
Specialty: Revive, Haste, Speed up, Freeze, Shield
Description: If a party member is KOd, it will cast life. Otherwise, can use "Let me Hear you!", an Aoe Healing Spell. "Try to keep up, now!", boosts the speed of all party members by 5 (80 max), or "Well if it isn't the VIP..." a Magic spell with very low potency that Freezes 100%, and gives one shield to every party member. His Limit Break, "What a Great Audience!" is a low potency heal that hastes all party members for a short duration

Name: Margy
Description: Can use Slice, a Single target Physical hit, Harvest Moon, a small potency AoE physical that sets one shield to herself, And Hell Ingress, a multi-Hit physical attack. Her LB, Perfectio, is an Aoe Physical hit.

Name: Shana
Description: Draws one of 3 cards at random. Will keep a set rotation after that: The Balance (10% Party Atk up), The Spear (10% Mag Up), The Arrow (10% Spi up). Each Card also gives 4 Shields to the party (5 The Balance) While healing 15% HP to the party. Her Limit Break becomes Astral Stasis if a party member is KO, fully revives it (only 1), gives 11 shields to the party, and refunds 50% ATB. If no party members are KOd, will use Macrocosmos, a low potency non elemental magical hit that gives 1 LB to 5 party members, and heals the party.

Name: Dangerniel
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Can use Thunderslash, a Thunder elemental single target physical hit with 50% to paralyze. His Limit Break, Spark field, is a Medium potency Thunder AoE Physical hit that reduces the defense of all bosses by 30%. Can counter attack with 50% chance with a physical thunder hit.

Name: Esquie
Specialty: Offensive up, Support, Limit Break Specialist
Description: Opens up with Taunt. Can use Smash, a single target physical hit. His Limit Break, Lightholder, is a Magical AoE Spell that boosts the Atk and Mag of the entire party by 30%
